latest_messages.headline: Tape constructive into the open — RTX is the high-conviction trade plan.
latest_messages.body: Risk-on setup: ES +0.22%, NQ +0.47%, 10Y -7bps to 4.38%, oil softer on US-Iran ceasefire. Catch: AMD missed last night and semis will open under pressure — leaning away from chips, into Industrials/Defense where flows are rotating. Top idea: RTX standard 12% (~$12K, 96 shares ~$125) — RBC upgrade 5/4, CFO $8M insider buy 5/3, defense tailwind, XLI rotation. -7% hard stop bracket. Backup: FIX 10% if RTX fills clean. No trades placed — research only. 0 of 3 weekly buys used.

latest_messages.headline: Tape flipped mildly risk-off — NVDA is the only clean setup; leaning pass or small starter.
latest_messages.body: Futures faded: ES -0.13%, NQ flat. 10Y +4bps to 4.29%. Crude up on Iran headlines. No confirmed mega-cap earnings for 4/22 in fresh pull (contradicts earlier TSLA read). Scout top pick: NVDA (next earnings 5/20, AI-infra tailwind), conviction med. Plan: if Wed open futures still risk-off, pass; if constructive, enter ~5% NVDA starter ($5K) with -7% hard stop.
